RESOURCE.DESCRIPTION: This file is generated by China-VO at 2026-06-22T14:55:40.565100, please contact support@china-vo.org if you find any problem.

FIELD.name: obsid
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Unique spectrum ID for each observation of each target

FIELD.name: uid
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Unique source identifier calculated with the "ura" and "udec" in table 9

FIELD.name: gp_id
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: For each LAMOST source, the equatorial coordinates ("ura" and "udec" in table 9) used to calculate "uid" were from which survey (Pan-STARRS, Gaia or LAMOST), "gp_id" gives the corresponding source identifier in that survey.

FIELD.name: designation
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Target designation

FIELD.name: obsdate
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Target observation date

FIELD.name: lmjd
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Local modified Julian day

FIELD.name: mjd
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Modified Julian day

FIELD.name: planid
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Plan name

FIELD.name: spid
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Spectrograph ID

FIELD.name: fiberid
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Fiber ID

FIELD.name: ra_obs
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Fiber pointing right ascension (degree)

FIELD.name: dec_obs
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Fiber pointing declination (degree)

FIELD.name: snru
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: S/N of u filter

FIELD.name: snrg
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: S/N of g filter

FIELD.name: snrr
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: S/N of r filter

FIELD.name: snri
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: S/N of i filter

FIELD.name: snrz
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: S/N of z filter

FIELD.name: class
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Spectral type

FIELD.name: subclass
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Stellar spectral type

FIELD.name: z
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Redshift

FIELD.name: z_err
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Redshift uncertainty

FIELD.name: ps_id
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The objID in the Pan-STARRS catalog

FIELD.name: mag_ps_g
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Pan-STARRS g band magnitude

FIELD.name: mag_ps_r
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Pan-STARRS r band magnitude

FIELD.name: mag_ps_i
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Pan-STARRS i band magnitude

FIELD.name: mag_ps_z
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Pan-STARRS z band magnitude

FIELD.name: mag_ps_y
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Pan-STARRS y band magnitude

FIELD.name: gaia_source_id
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The "source_id" field of Gaia DR3 catalog

FIELD.name: gaia_g_mean_mag
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The "phot_g_mean_mag" field of Gaia DR3 catalog

FIELD.name: fibertype
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Fiber type of target [Obj, Sky, F-std, Unused, PosErr, Dead]

FIELD.name: offsets
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Whether there is a fiber offset during observation

FIELD.name: offsets_v
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: If the "offsets" field is true, "offsets_v" gives the offset distance from the target"s coordinator in input catalog (arcsec)

FIELD.name: ra
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Right ascension from input catalog (degree)

FIELD.name: dec
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Declination from input catalog (degree)

FIELD.name: fibermask
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Possible fiber problems

FIELD.name: with_norm_flux
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: It has two values of 0 and 1, 1 represents the FITS file provides the normalized spectrum, and 0 means it does not. The normalized flux is in the data array of extension 1.

FIELD.name: logg_err
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Surface gravity uncertainty obtained by the LASP

FIELD.name: teff
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Effective temperature obtained by the LASP

FIELD.name: vsini_lasp
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Projected rotation velocity given by the LASP

FIELD.name: feh_err
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Metallicity uncertainty obtained by the LASP

FIELD.name: alpha_m_err
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The uncertainty of alpha_m

FIELD.name: rv_err
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Uncertainty of heliocentric radial velocity obtained by the LASP

FIELD.name: rv
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Heliocentric radial velocity obtained by the LASP

FIELD.name: teff_err
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Effective temperature uncertainty obtained by the LASP

FIELD.name: alpha_m
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Alpha element abundance estimated by the LASP

FIELD.name: logg
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Surface gravity obtained by the LASP

FIELD.name: feh
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Metallicity obtained by the LASP

FIELD.name: hdelta12
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Hdelta line Index with band widths of 12 Å

FIELD.name: hbeta12
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Hbeta line Index with band widths of 12 Å

FIELD.name: halpha48
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Halpha line Index with band widths of 48 Å

FIELD.name: hgamma24
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Hgamma line Index with band widths of 24 Å

FIELD.name: halpha_d02
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Width at 20% below the local continuum of Halpha line

FIELD.name: halpha24
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Halpha line Index with band widths of 24 Å

FIELD.name: hdelta_d02
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Width at 20% below the local continuum of Hdelta line

FIELD.name: paschen242
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Paschen line index from local continuum at 8751.0 with band widths of 42.0

FIELD.name: hbeta_d02
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Width at 20% below the local continuum of Hbeta line

FIELD.name: halpha70
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Halpha line Index with band widths of 70 Å

FIELD.name: hdelta24
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Hdelta line Index with band widths of 24 Å

FIELD.name: kp12
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Ca II K line index with band widths of 12 Å

FIELD.name: hgamma54
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Hgamma line Index with band widths of 54 Å

FIELD.name: paschen13
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Paschen line index from local continuum at 8467.5 with band widths of 13.0

FIELD.name: hbeta24
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Hbeta line Index with band widths of 24 Å

FIELD.name: hgamma48
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Hgamma line Index with band widths of 48 Å

FIELD.name: halpha12
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Halpha line Index with band widths of 12 Å

FIELD.name: kp18
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Ca II K line index with band widths of 18 Å

FIELD.name: hdelta48
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Hdelta line Index with band widths of 48 Å

FIELD.name: hbeta48
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Hbeta line Index with band widths of 48 Å

FIELD.name: hbeta60
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Hbeta line Index with band widths of 60 Å

FIELD.name: hgamma_d02
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Width at 20% below the local continuum of Hgama line

FIELD.name: hgamma12
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Hgamma line Index with band widths of 12 Å

FIELD.name: paschen142
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Paschen line index from local continuum at 8598.0 with band widths of 42.0

FIELD.name: kp6
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Ca II K line index with band widths of 6 Å

FIELD.name: hdelta64
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Hdelta line Index with band widths of 64 Å

FIELD.name: tio4_err
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Spectral indice Error of TiO4

FIELD.name: cah1_err
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Spectral indice Error of CaH1

FIELD.name: ewha
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: EW of Halpha line

FIELD.name: tio1_err
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Spectral indice Error of TiO1

FIELD.name: tio5_err
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Spectral indice Error of TiO5

FIELD.name: tio1
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Spectral indice of TiO1

FIELD.name: m_h_err
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Metallicity uncertainty estimated with the method LASP used

FIELD.name: cah2
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Spectral indice of CaH2

FIELD.name: caoh_err
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Spectral indice Error of CaOH

FIELD.name: cah3_err
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Spectral indice Error of CaH3

FIELD.name: type
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Magnetic activity

FIELD.name: m_h
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Metallicity obtained by the minimum chi-squre estimation

FIELD.name: caoh
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Spectral indice of CaOH

FIELD.name: tio5
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Spectral indice of TiO5

FIELD.name: cah3
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Spectral indice of CaH3

FIELD.name: cah2_err
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Spectral indice Error of CaH2

FIELD.name: cah1
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Spectral indice of CaH1

FIELD.name: zeta
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Metallicity sensitive parameter

FIELD.name: tio4
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Spectral indice of TiO4

FIELD.name: tio3
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Spectral indice of TiO3

FIELD.name: ewha_err
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: EW uncertainty of Halpha line

FIELD.name: tio2_err
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Spectral indice Error of TiO2

FIELD.name: tio3_err
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Spectral indice Error of TiO3

FIELD.name: na
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Line indice of Na line

FIELD.name: tio2
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Spectral indice of TiO2

FIELD.name: zeta_err
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Error of metallicity sensitive parameter

FIELD.name: wd_subclass
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Spectral sub-types of white dwarf stars

FIELD.name: halpha_flux
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Total integrated flux in the Halpha emission line

FIELD.name: metal_mw
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Metallicity (Mass-weighted)

FIELD.name: oiii_4960_flux
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Total integrated flux in the [O III] 4960 emission line

FIELD.name: sii_6718_ew
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: EW of the [S II] 6718 emission line

FIELD.name: nii_6585_ew
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: EW of the [N II] 6585 emission line

FIELD.name: hbeta_ew
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: EW of the Hbeta emission line

FIELD.name: age_mw
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Age (Mass-weighted)

FIELD.name: nii_6550_ew
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: EW of the [N II] 6550 emission line

FIELD.name: vsig
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Stellar velocity dispersion

FIELD.name: sii_6718_flux
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Total integrated flux in the [S II] 6718 emission line

FIELD.name: sii_6733_ew
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: EW of the [S II] 6733 emission line

FIELD.name: oiii_5008_flux
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Total integrated flux in the [O III] 5008 emission line

FIELD.name: halpha_ew
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: EW of the Halpha emission line

FIELD.name: hbeta_flux
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Total integrated flux in the Hbeta emission line

FIELD.name: oiii_5008_ew
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: EW of the [O III] 5008 emission line

FIELD.name: nii_6585_flux
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Total integrated flux in the [N II] 6585 emission line

FIELD.name: sii_6733_flux
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Total integrated flux in the [S II] 6733 emission line

FIELD.name: vsig_err
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The uncertainty of Stellar velocity dispersion

FIELD.name: age_lw
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Age (Light-weighted)

FIELD.name: oiii_4960_ew
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: EW of the [O III] 4960 emission line

FIELD.name: nii_6550_flux
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Total integrated flux in the [N II] 6550 emission line

FIELD.name: metal_lw
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Metallicity (Light-weighted)

FIELD.name: balmer_tau_e
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Optical depth at the Balmer edge of 3646 Å

FIELD.name: fitting_status_2
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The fitting status of the second group lines, and the value larger than 0 means a success fitting. See https://idlastro.gsfc.nasa.gov/ftp/pro/markwardt/mpfit.pro for other values.

FIELD.name: ciii_na_2_sigma
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Line dispersion in natural logarithm of the second CIII narrow component

FIELD.name: hb_br_1_peak_wavelength
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak wavelength in natural logarithm of Hbeta broad component

FIELD.name: ndof_4
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Degree of freedom in the fitting of the fourth group lines

FIELD.name: fe_op_norm
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Normalization parameter of Fe II spectrum in optical band

FIELD.name: fitting_status_6
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The fitting status of the sixth group lines, and the value larger than 0 means a success fitting. See https://idlastro.gsfc.nasa.gov/ftp/pro/markwardt/mpfit.pro for other values.

FIELD.name: balmer_teff
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Electron temperature

FIELD.name: red_chi2_6
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Reduced chi-square in the fitting of the sixth group lines

FIELD.name: line_name_6
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The name of the sixth group of spectral lines

FIELD.name: ndof_2
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Degree of freedom in the fitting of the second group lines

FIELD.name: hb_na_1_peak_flux
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak flux of Hbeta narrow component

FIELD.name: civ_ew
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: EW of entire C IV

FIELD.name: lya_area
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Integrated Flux of entire Lya

FIELD.name: ha_peak_wavelength
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak wavelenth of entire Halpha

FIELD.name: red_chi2_4
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Reduced chi-square in the fitting of the fourth group lines

FIELD.name: balmer_norm
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Normalization parameter of Balmer continuum

FIELD.name: mgii_br_1_peak_wavelength
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak wavelength in natural logarithm of Mg II broad component

FIELD.name: civ_sigma
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Line dispersion of entire C IV

FIELD.name: ciii_na_2_peak_wavelength
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak wavelength in natural logarithm of the second C III narrow component

FIELD.name: lya_na_1_peak_flux
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak flux of Lya narrow component

FIELD.name: poly_b
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The coefficient of the quadratic term of the third-order polynomial in the continuum fitting

FIELD.name: sii6718_1_peak_flux
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak flux of [S II] 6718

FIELD.name: mgii_na_1_peak_wavelength
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak wavelength in natural logarithm of the first Mg II narrow component

FIELD.name: hb_ew
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: EW of entire Hbeta

FIELD.name: mgii_area
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Integrated Flux of entire Mg II

FIELD.name: line_name_2
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The name of the second group of spectral lines

FIELD.name: ha_sigma
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Line dispersion of entire Halpha

FIELD.name: civ_br_1_sigma
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Line dispersion in natural logarithm of C IV broad component

FIELD.name: civ_peak_wavelength
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak wavelenth of entire C IV

FIELD.name: hb_sigma
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Line dispersion of entire Hbeta

FIELD.name: ciii_br_2_peak_flux
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak flux of the second C III broad component

FIELD.name: civ_na_1_peak_wavelength
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak wavelength in natural logarithm of C IV narrow component

FIELD.name: line_name_4
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The name of the fourth group of spectral lines

FIELD.name: mgii_br_1_peak_flux
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak flux of Mg II broad component

FIELD.name: mgii_ew
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: EW of entire Mg II

FIELD.name: hb_na_1_peak_wavelength
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak wavelength in natural logarithm of Hbeta narrow component

FIELD.name: sii6718_1_sigma
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Line dispersion in natural logarithm of [S II] 6718

FIELD.name: lya_br_1_peak_wavelength
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak wavelength in natural logarithm of Lya broad component

FIELD.name: l3000
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Continuum luminosity in common logarithm at rest-frame 3000 Å

FIELD.name: mgii_na_2_sigma
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Line dispersion in natural logarithm of the second Mg II narrow component

FIELD.name: mgii_na_2_peak_flux
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak flux of the second Mg II narrow component

FIELD.name: hb_br_1_peak_flux
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak flux of Hbeta broad component

FIELD.name: civ_br_1_peak_wavelength
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak wavelength in natural logarithm of C IV broad component

FIELD.name: mgii_peak_wavelength
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak wavelenth of entire Mg II

FIELD.name: ciii_ew
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: EW of entire C III

FIELD.name: sii6732_1_sigma
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Line dispersion in natural logarithm of [S II] 6732

FIELD.name: civ_br_1_peak_flux
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak flux of CIV broad component

FIELD.name: hb_area
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Integrated Flux of entire Hbeta

FIELD.name: ha_br_3_peak_flux
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak flux of Halpha broad component

FIELD.name: fe_uv_fwhm
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Rest-frame FWHM of Fe II spectrum in UV band

FIELD.name: line_name_1
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The name of the first group of spectral lines

FIELD.name: oiii4959_1_peak_wavelength
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak wavelength in natural logarithm of [O III] 4959

FIELD.name: min_chi2_1
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Minimal chi-square in the fitting of the first group lines

FIELD.name: oiii5007_1_peak_flux
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak flux of [O III] 5007

FIELD.name: sn_ratio_conti
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Continuum S/N

FIELD.name: sii6732_1_peak_flux
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak flux of [S II] 6732

FIELD.name: oiii4959_1_sigma
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Line dispersion in natural logarithm of [O III] 4959

FIELD.name: nii6549_1_sigma
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Line dispersion in natural logarithm of [N II] 6549

FIELD.name: lya_br_1_sigma
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Line dispersion in natural logarithm of Lya broad component

FIELD.name: min_chi2_6
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Minimal chi-square in the fitting of the sixth group lines

FIELD.name: ha_br_1_peak_flux
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak flux of the first Halpha broad component

FIELD.name: lya_sigma
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Line dispersion of entire Lya

FIELD.name: pl_slope
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Slope of AGN power law

FIELD.name: ciii_br_2_peak_wavelength
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak wavelength in natural logarithm of the second C III broad component

FIELD.name: fe_op_shift
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Wavelength shift of Fe II spectrum in optical band

FIELD.name: fitting_status_5
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The fitting status of the fifth group lines, and the value larger than 0 means a success fitting. See https://idlastro.gsfc.nasa.gov/ftp/pro/markwardt/mpfit.pro for other values.

FIELD.name: mgii_br_1_sigma
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Line dispersion in natural logarithm of Mg II broad component

FIELD.name: ha_br_2_peak_flux
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak flux of the second Halpha broad component

FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Line dispersion in natural logarithm of Hbeta narrow component

FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The name of the fifth group of spectral lines

FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Reduced chi-square in the fitting of the fifth group lines

FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak wavelength in natural logarithm of the first C III narrow component

FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Line dispersion of entire Mg II

FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak wavelength in natural logarithm of [S II] 6718

FIELD.name: ha_br_1_sigma
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Line dispersion in natural logarithm of the first Halpha broad component

FIELD.name: l1350
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Continuum luminosity in common logarithm at rest-frame 1350 Å

FIELD.name: ndof_3
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Degree of freedom in the fitting of the third group lines

FIELD.name: poly_a
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The coefficient of the first term of the third-order polynomial in the continuum fitting

FIELD.name: ciii_na_2_peak_flux
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak flux of the second C III narrow component

FIELD.name: ha_fwhm
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: FWHM of entire Halpha

FIELD.name: ha_na_1_sigma
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Line dispersion in natural logarithm of Halpha narrow component

FIELD.name: min_chi2_2
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Minimal chi-square in the fitting of the second group lines

FIELD.name: pl_norm
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Normalization parameter of AGN power law

FIELD.name: fitting_status_1
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The fitting status of the first group lines, and the value larger than 0 means a success fitting. See https://idlastro.gsfc.nasa.gov/ftp/pro/markwardt/mpfit.pro

FIELD.name: civ_na_1_sigma
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Line dispersion in natural logarithm of CIV narrow component

FIELD.name: ciii_area
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Integrated Flux of entire C III

FIELD.name: ha_br_3_peak_wavelength
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak wavelength in natural logarithm of the third Halpha broad component

FIELD.name: poly_c
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The coefficient of the cubic term of the third-order polynomial in the continuum fitting

FIELD.name: red_chi2_1
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Reduced chi-square in the fitting of the first group lines

FIELD.name: fitting_status_4
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The fitting status of the fourth group lines, and the value larger than 0 means a success fitting. See https://idlastro.gsfc.nasa.gov/ftp/pro/markwardt/mpfit.pro for other values.

FIELD.name: ndof_6
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Degree of freedom in the fitting of the sixth group lines

FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Line dispersion in natural logarithm of the first Mg II narrow component

FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Line dispersion in natural logarithm of [O III] 5007

FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Continuum luminosity in common logarithm at rest-frame 5100 Å

FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Peak flux of C IV narrow component

FIELD.DESCRIPTION: The fitting status of the third group lines, and the value larger than 0 means a success fitting. See https://idlastro.gsfc.nasa.gov/ftp/pro/markwardt/mpfit.pro for other values.

FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Rest-frame FWHM of Fe II spectrum in optical band

FIELD.DESCRIPTION: Degree of freedom in the fitting of the fifth group lines

FIELD.name: file
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: file save path

FIELD.name: spec
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: FITS filename

FIELD.name: char_main_id
FIELD.DESCRIPTION: obsid
